title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nivea India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nivea India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Nivea India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nivea India:
Nivea India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
